channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla wins big as NHTSA drops three-year, 120k unit probe against Model Y
item.description: A probe into over 120,000 2023 Tesla Model Y units has been closed by the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA). The probe ends without the agency requiring any action from Tesla. The probe, designated PE23-003, opened in March 2023 and stemmed from just two consumer complaints i...

item.title: Ross Gerber Thinks Elon Musk's SpaceX, Tesla Could Create 'Berkshire Hathaway Of AI'
item.description: Investor Ross Gerber of Gerber Kawasaki thinks that the Tesla Inc. and SpaceX merger could lead to an entity like Warren Buffett‘s Berkshire Hathaway Inc. in the artificial intelligence space.

item.title: Report: SpaceX Ties Elon Musk's Pay To Mars Colony, Space Data Centers
item.description: The SpaceX board approved a new pay package for CEO Elon Musk that includes huge stock awards should the company reach certain milestones, as it prepares to go public.

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Stuck in Neutral. Good News From NHTSA Isn’t Helping.
item.description: NHTSA recently opened an investigation into missing steering wheel bolts on 2023 Tesla Model Y vehicles. Investigations sound serious, and vehicle safety is serious. Tesla recalls typically get a lot of attention because the company is the world’s most valuable car maker, and EVs are relatively...

item.title: Tesla Model Y L gets biggest hint yet that it’s coming to the U.S.
item.description: The Tesla Model Y L is perhaps the most wanted vehicle in the company’s lineup in the United States, especially now that it is void of a true family vehicle with the removal of the Model X. In China, Tesla currently offers a longer, more family-friendly version of the Model Y, known as the Model ...

item.title: Tesla begins probing owners on FSD’s navigation errors with small but mighty change
item.description: Tesla has started probing owners on how often its Full Self-Driving suite has Navigation errors with a small but mighty change last night. In its latest Software Update, which is Version 2026.2.9.9 featuring Full Self-Driving (Supervised) v14.3.2 , Tesla has introduced a targeted improvement to h...

item.title: Roamly Launches World’s First Real-Time Insurance for Autonomous Fleets with a 50% Discount
item.description: Solving an autonomous fleet pain point, the new Roamly FSD (Full Self Driving) insurance dynamically adjusts insurance cost by the mile when vehicle is in FSD mode Roamly Launches World’s First Real-Time Insurance for Autonomous Fleets with a 50% Discount Roamly Launches World’s First Real-Time I...

item.title: Tesla Rival BYD Reports Plunging Earnings. China EV Giant Is Betting On A Flash Recovery.
item.description: BYD earnings dived in Q1 amid brutal local competition for the China EV giant. The Tesla rival is betting on flash charging to revive sales.

item.title: Dan Ives Predicts '80%, 90%' Chance Of SpaceX-Tesla Merger By Early 2027
item.description: Tech bull Dan Ives is predicting a major consolidation of Elon Musk's corporate empire, forecasting a highly probable merger between Tesla Inc. and IPO-bound SpaceX by early 2027. The Merger Timeline Speaking to Schwab Network about the potential for the two visionary companies to combine under o...

item.title: Tesla’s Down 16% This Year But Analysts See Upside With a $420 Price Target
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) just delivered a strong quarter with improving margins and accelerating free cash flow. However, investors are increasingly focused on rising spending and whether Tesla’s biggest bets on autonomy and robotics will pay off soon enough to justify the stock’s current valuation. T...

item.title: Prediction: Will the SpaceX IPO Reach a $1.75 Trillion Valuation?
item.description: Reports claim SpaceX is targeting a monster valuation.

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises. Musk's Share Overhang Is Back in Focus
item.description: Concerns over AI progress and potential share sales pressure Tesla after earnings

item.title: Worldcoin In Trouble? Sam Altman Faces Scam Allegations From ZachXBT and Elon Musk
item.description: ZachXBT slams Worldcoin as a predatory scam that uses low-float token tactics and insider selling to target vulnerable users. Worldcoin hit with bans in Kenya, ...

item.title: Weighing Tesla (TSLA) Valuation After Recent Share Price Swings And Long Term Return Strength
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is back in focus for investors after recent share price swings, including a roughly 5% gain over the past month and a decline of about 12% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Tesla. At a latest share price of $378.67, Tesla’s recent 4.65% 30 day share price return con...

item.title: Should You Rush to Get in on the SpaceX IPO? History Offers a Strikingly Clear Answer.
item.description: SpaceX could begin trading in June.

item.title: Analysis-SpaceX ties Musk compensation to Mars colonization goal
item.description: SpaceX's board has approved a compensation plan for founder Elon Musk with goals as futuristic and celestial as the company's ambitions: colonizing Mars and running data centers in outer space. The details of Musk's sweeping pay package, which have not been widely reported, were revealed in the ‌...

item.title: China's Chery aims to be 'Toyota plus Tesla' in global growth push
item.description: STORY: China’s largest car exporter, Chery, is looking to two different playbooks as it pushes deeper into Europe and other global markets. Chairman Yin Tongyue calls it the “double T” strategy, drawing from Toyota and Tesla to guide the company’s next phase of growth. "Toyota is the best one in ...

item.title: Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) Falls Shy of Revenue, Beats on Profit in Q1
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is among the 15 Best Big Name Stocks to Buy. On April 22, the company reported financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, with earnings beating estimates and topline coming in shy of forecasts.

item.title: Elon Musk’s Nutso Comments on US National Debt & Robots
item.description: Elon Musk said on the latest quarterly Tesla conference call, last week, that the first production line for the company’s Optimus robot would go online this year — this quarter even — and that this production line would be able to produce 1 million robots a year. This Optimus production ... [co...

item.title: Hardware 3 Tesla Vehicles Will Get Unsupervised Full Self Driving Via Hardware Updates? Who’s Most Pissed?
item.description: Many of us who bought Tesla’s Full Self Driving (FSD) package several years ago have been highly disappointed with its slow progress, and also repeatedly false claims about the technology. The thing is: Tesla cars produced with “Hardware 3” computers, sensors, etc. were supposed to be buying cars...

item.title: Uber CEO has a strong 2-word message for investors
item.description: Uber Technologies (UBER) has been stuck in a familiar debate. Investors see autonomous vehicles as an existential threat, with companies like Waymo and Tesla building Robotaxi networks that could bypass the platform. That concern helps explain why shares are down about 10% this year, even as ...

item.title: Tesla Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
item.description: Although Tesla has outperformed the S&P 500 over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a cautious outlook about the stock’s prospects.

item.title: Tesla: Disastrous Robotaxi Checkup
Tesla: What Most Don't Know About FSD
Elon Musk Reportedly Used SpaceX As 'Piggy Bank' To Give Himself, Tesla A Leg Up
item.description: Elon Musk borrowed $500 million from SpaceX at interest rates as low as 1%, used the rocket company to bail out a struggling solar venture, and most recently had SpaceX swallow his cash-burning AI lab, according to a New York Times investigation published Friday. The report lands six weeks before...

item.title: Earnings Season Surprises
item.description: With earnings season now in full swing, the team takes a look at the latest results from Tesla and some of the most prominent technology companies in the market.

item.title: Tesla's Earnings Were Underwhelming. Here's Why They're Not Likely to Weigh Down the Stock
item.description: How Tesla performed during the last three months is unlikely to change investors' minds about its long-term growth prospects.

item.title: Tesla: Why Q1 Results Were A Disappointment
Elon Musk vs. Sam Altman: What to know about the OpenAI case
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) and SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) CEO Elon Musk is meeting OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) CEO Sam Altman in court this week over an alleged breach of the private artificial intelligence (AI) developer's nonprofit mission. Musk is also a co-founder of OpenAI. Yahoo Finance Technology Editor Dan Howley explain...

item.title: TOMI Environmental Positioned for Accelerated Growth as Robotaxi Market Rapidly Expands
item.description: TOMI Leverages Proprietary SteraMist iHP Technology to Scale Global Fleet DisinfectionFREDERICK, Md., April 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc.® (“TOMI”) (NASDAQ: TOMZ), a global leader in disinfection and decontamination solutions, today announced its strategic readin...

item.title: Musk vs. Altman: Burning Man, a ‘diary,’ and a trial almost no one thinks Musk can win
item.description: The lawsuit is a long shot for Elon Musk, nonprofit legal expert Sam Brunson warns.

item.title: Investors Are Panicking About $25 Billion in Spending at Tesla, but the SpaceX IPO Could Mean It Doesn’t Even Matter
item.description: Tesla's Q1 revenue beat and improving margins were overshadowed by a $25 billion 2026 capex plan, nearly triple last year's spending, that puts free cash flow negative for the rest of the year and explains why the stock fell even on a strong earnings print.

item.title: Tesla: Recovering Car Sales, Plus Non-Car Catalysts To Drive The Stock (Upgrade)
TESLA (TSLA) To Boost Investments in AI, Robotics and Chips
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 8 Best Automotive Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. The stock grew 31.63% in the past year, while it declined 14.10% year-to-date.

item.title: Tesla Q1 Earnings: Catalysts Galore (Rating Upgrade)
Musk and Altman face off in federal court. Here's what to know.
item.description: The trial comes at a pivotal moment for AI, a technology poised to bring advancement that could also drastically reshape humanity.

item.title: The Biggest Catalyst for Tesla Stock in History Could Trigger in Just 3 Months
item.description: Tesla’s Optimus robot and autonomy strategy could soon become a key catalyst, especially with TSLA coming off a recent decline.

item.title: Tesla CEO Musk Nears Launch of X Money
item.description: This article first appeared on GuruFocus. Tesla (TSLA, Financials) Chief Executive Elon Musk is ready to roll out X Money, a payments and banking service on the X platform, as part of his vision for a everything app.The system is intended to include peer-to-peer transfers, a debit card and saving...

item.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman prepare to face off in court
item.description: Two of the most powerful men in Silicon Valley are preparing to face off in court this week as the decade-long feud over the founding of OpenAI comes to trial.

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Tesla, Qualcomm, Sandisk, Domino’s Pizza, Micron, Meta, Organon, Avis, and More
item.description: Qualcomm is trading lower despite a tech supply chain analyst saying OpenAI is working with the chip maker to develop smartphone processors.

item.title: Tesla expands Robotaxi in a way that was long anticipated
item.description: Tesla has expanded Robotaxi in a way that was long anticipated, and it does not have to do with a new, larger geofence in a city where it already offered its partially autonomous ride-hailing suite, or a new city altogether. Instead, it has to do with the consumer base it offers Robotaxi to , bec...

item.title: Elon Musk Just Delivered Great News for Tesla, but Don't Rush to Buy the Stock
item.description: Despite a series of positive developments, Tesla stock might still be too expensive to buy right now.

item.title: Tesla Officially Registers Elon Musk’s Stock: What Investors Need to Know
item.description: Tesla registered some stock for CEO Elon Musk. On Friday, Tesla filed forms with the Securities and Exchange Commission registering about 304 million shares of common stock relating to Musk’s 2018 pay award. Tesla shareholders voted to award the often-debated options in 2012.

item.title: Tesla’s AI Bet vs. Ford’s Truck Fortress: Two Paths to Profitability in 2026
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and Ford Motor (NYSE:F) just delivered earnings reports that read like dispatches from two different industries. Tesla posted Q1 2026 results powered by AI, autonomy, and margin recovery. Ford closed out Q4 2025 with a heavy EV writedown and a turnaround pitch built around tru...

item.title: Tesla's Next Growth Wave Unfolds
First drive: next-gen Xiaomi SU7 shows how fast Chinese EVs are improving
item.description: I got behind the wheel of the next-generation Xiaomi SU7, and the upgrades are significant. The refreshed electric sedan delivers up to 902 km (560 miles) of CLTC range, 800V charging architecture across all trims, and standard LiDAR — all while still undercutting the Tesla Model 3 in China. Xiao...

item.title: Elon Musk Says It Would Only Take 100 Miles By 100 Miles Of Solar Panels To Power The Entire U.S. —The Sun Is 'Really Reliable. It Comes Up Every Day'
item.description: Big ideas usually come with big footprints. Elon Musk has been arguing the opposite for nearly a decade. At the National Governors Association Summer Meeting in July 2017, the Tesla and SpaceX laid out a vision that sounded almost too...

item.title: Elon Musk Registers 304 Million Tesla Shares. Stock Sinks.
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk registered over 300 million shares of Tesla tied to his 2018 compensation plan, according to new SEC filings.

item.title: Musk’s Net Worth Races Toward $1 Trillion
item.description: Elon Musk’s net worth has jumped $26 billion this year to $645 billion. And this is before it is clear what SpaceX’s value will be when it goes public. It has been put at as high as $1.75 trillion, after raising $75 billion in the IPO.

item.title: This Will Be Tesla’s Stock Price In 2027
item.description: Tesla’s (NASDAQ: TSLA) Q1 2026 results gave bulls something to cheer about, but the stock remains stuck in a choppy range heading into summer. Here is where our proprietary model sees shares going over the next 12 months, and what would have to change for that view to shift. Tesla trades at $387.51.
